remake_first.source_title: Auroras glow when solar particles hit air
remake_first.action: remake with sharper title and first-second visual text
instructions: Keep the winning subject promise, but change the first sentence.
Use a different animal or a visibly different angle when possible.
Try another narrative template and narrator variant.
Do not reuse the same source clip.

confidence.reasoning: category has 0/5 samples, inferred data, confidence 0.00; observation only.

growth_retention.reasoning: category has 0/5 samples, inferred data, confidence 0.00; observation only.

fixes: Add an action verb such as erupt, form, escape, recover, use, or change.

rewrite_instructions: Open with the subject plus outcome in the first two seconds.
Remove setup; explain only the mechanism viewers can see or imagine.
Keep the remake shorter than the original if retention was below 62%.
Change the thumbnail promise, not just the wording.
